---
title: "Computing for the Social Sciences"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: cosmo
---

### Course Information Summer 2026

<div class="my-4"></div>

**Lectures**: Monday to Thursday, 9:30–11:30 AM, Synchronous lectures via Zoom. The Zoom link is accessible by enrolled students through [Canvas](https://canvas.uchicago.edu/courses/72552)

<!--
Join Zoom Meeting
https://uchicago.zoom.us/j/96914317288?pwd=6IWBa75F5zDSaszslKV2bx29FlEOw8.1
Meeting ID: 969 1431 7288
Passcode: 667323
-->

<div class="my-4"></div>

**Teaching Team**:  

- Instructor: Sabrina Nardin (she/her) – [nardin@uchicago.edu](mailto:nardin@uchicago.edu)  
- TA: Rubén Rodríguez Barron (he/him) – [rrodriguezbarron@uchicago.edu](mailto:rrodriguezbarron@uchicago.edu)
- Grader: Xulan Jiang (he/him) – [xulanj@uchicago.edu](mailto:xulanj@uchicago.edu)

<div class="my-4"></div>

**Office Hours**:

- **Sabrina:** Monday to Thursday immediately after class 11:30-noon; use [Sabrina OHs Zoom link](https://uchicago.zoom.us/j/93525400792?pwd=L0JCdEdpTUlFemt3UnBNYmd4L0J2UT09)
- **Rubén:** Monday 1:30-3:30 PM [by appointment](https://calendly.com/rrodriguezbarron/15min); use [Rubén OHs Zoom link](https://uchicago.zoom.us/j/92281114673?pwd=UFIBbbDSsJNZAzYzahaDVGDMre1SkR.1)

Please use the scheduled OHs whenever possible; these are the main times reserved for course support. If you cannot attend during those times or prefer to meet in person, send us a private message on [Ed Discussion](https://edstem.org/us/courses/99633/discussion/8125270) to check availability.

<div class="my-4"></div>

**Quick Links**:  

- [R Workbench](https://macss-r.uchicago.edu/)  
- [Canvas](https://canvas.uchicago.edu/courses/72552)  
- [Ed Discussion](https://edstem.org/us/courses/99633/discussion/8125270)
- [UChicago GenAI](https://genai.uchicago.edu/en)
